title: Section 21
content: Fund of 1[Institutes].--(1) 2[Every Institute shall] maintain a Fund to which shall be credited— (a) all moneys provided by the Central Government; (b) all fees and other charges; (c) all moneys received by the Institute by way of grants, gifts, donations, benefactions, bequests or transfers; and (d) all moneys received by the Institute in any other manner or from any other source. (2) All moneys credited to the Fund shall be deposited in such banks or invested in such manner as the Institute may, with the approval of the Central Government, decide. (3) The Fund shall be applied towards meeting the expenses of the Institute including expenses incurred in the exercise of its powers and discharge of its duties under this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2021, s. 22, for "Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022). 2. Subs. by s. 22, ibid., for "The Institute shall" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
